fields.model_id: Execution model that generated the signal
fields.categories_passed: List of validation categories that passed
fields.categories_failed: List of validation categories that failed
fields.rejection_codes: List of specific rejection codes (e.g., TVL-C2-01)
fields.verification_time_ms: Time taken to complete all validations (milliseconds)
fields.webhook_transmitted: True if webhook was sent (only possible if VERIFIED)
fields.broker_acknowledged: True if broker confirmed order receipt
fields.final_execution: True if order was filled at broker
fields.audit_hash: SHA256 of the complete record for tamper detection
